abilities.name: Broken Claim
abilities.text: Once per round, when you clear a lucrative lane or recover live salvage, you can twist the moment into progress on your active objective.

abilities.name: Ash Tithe
abilities.text: Every quiet victory still feels like something the world owes you back.

abilities.name: Crown Debt
abilities.text: People who owe you fear your patience more than your temper.

abilities.name: Ruin Courtesy
abilities.text: You move through broken grandeur like it still belongs to you.
